title: Can Your Lunch Damage Your Day?

scenes.text: Your lunch can make or break your entire afternoon mood and energy!
Foods high in sugar can lead to an energy crash later in the day.
Balanced meals with protein and fiber help stabilize energy levels.
Focus on whole grains, veggies, and lean protein for lunch.
scenes.label: SMART LUNCHES

scenes.text: Follow for simple habits that boost your health.

description: Lunch has the power to influence your mood and productivity. Learn how to choose smart meals for sustained energy! Follow for daily health tips!
